name: HATHOR-EPI-001 pass — Pentavalent dose 1 satisfies DPT + HepB + Hib components
description: Nigerian Pentavalent dose 1 at 70 days. EPI-001 falls back to ACIP/DAK component-maximum minimum age (max of DPT=42, HepB=0, Hib=42 = 42 days); 70 ≥ 42 → pass with rationale referencing 3 components.

recommendations.reasoning: Pentavalent dose 1 at 70 days; DPT/HepB/Hib components.
